text: Jamaicans are deemed to be among the most violent persons on planet Earth . Some argue that it has to do with our legacy of slavery which in itself was an act of extreme violence . Some even posit that it may well be that we have too much sugar in our blood ; while others point to the socio-economic conditions that the majority of black Jamaicans have to live under which have led them to a point of hopelessness and anger .
